scripts.build: tsc -p tsconfig.build.json && tsc -p tsconfig.bin.json && tsc -p tsconfig.test-harness.json
scripts.typecheck: tsc --noEmit && tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.bin.json && tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.test-harness.json && tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.consumer-api.json && tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.tests.json && tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.k8s-bringup.json
scripts.test: npm run test:fake && npm run test:live:short
scripts.test:ci: npm run test:fake && npm run test:live:medium
scripts.test:nightly: npm run test:fake && npm run test:live:long && npm run test:k8s:failover && npm run test:k8s:soak
scripts.test:k8s: NODE_OPTIONS='--max-old-space-size=1024' tsx tests/k8s/scripts/up-if-needed.ts && NODE_OPTIONS='--max-old-space-size=1024' vitest run -c vitest.config.k8s.ts
scripts.test:k8s:fresh: NODE_OPTIONS='--max-old-space-size=1024' tsx tests/k8s/scripts/down.ts && NODE_OPTIONS='--max-old-space-size=1024' tsx tests/k8s/scripts/up-full.ts && NODE_OPTIONS='--max-old-space-size=1024' vitest run -c vitest.config.k8s.ts
scripts.test:k8s:proxy-host-mode: helm upgrade --install sip-front-proxy deploy/helm/sip-front-proxy -n sip-test --create-namespace -f tests/k8s/values/sip-front-proxy.yaml -f tests/k8s/values/sip-front-proxy.host.yaml --wait --timeout 120s
scripts.test:k8s:proxy-cluster-mode: helm upgrade --install sip-front-proxy deploy/helm/sip-front-proxy -n sip-test --create-namespace -f tests/k8s/values/sip-front-proxy.yaml --wait --timeout 120s
scripts.test:k8s:failover: NODE_OPTIONS='--max-old-space-size=1024' tsx tests/k8s/scripts/up-if-needed.ts && NODE_OPTIONS='--max-old-space-size=1024' vitest run -c vitest.config.k8s.ts tests/k8s/proxy-drain.test.ts tests/k8s/proxy-failover-*.test.ts
scripts.test:k8s:soak: NODE_OPTIONS='--max-old-space-size=1024' tsx tests/k8s/scripts/up-if-needed.ts && NODE_OPTIONS='--max-old-space-size=1024' vitest run -c vitest.config.k8s.ts tests/k8s/proxy-limiter-soak.test.ts
scripts.test:rule-kill: echo 'test:rule-kill is disabled — too slow pending fake-clock speedup. Run `tsx scripts/rule-kill.ts` manually if needed.' && exit 0
